docket_entries.description: REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (REQUEST FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 FOR JUDICIAL REVIEW & SIGNATURE.) (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUYAKBAYEV, DANIYAR
ORDER RE: DISMISSED W/O PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

THE HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES OF MAY-11-2018 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO APPEARANCE(S). NO APPEARANCE BY DANIYAR TUYAKBAYEV (APPLICANT). NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,987.00 FILED BY TUYAKBAYEV, DANIYAR AS TO DEFENDANT KARTSEV, PAVEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-29-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

HEARING ORDERED FOR APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES THE COURT NEEDS MORE INFORMATION TO DECIDE WHETHER TO GRANT YOUR REQUEST. YOU MUST GO TO COURT ON THE DATE BELOW. THE HEARING WILL BE ABOUT INCOME. BRING PROOF OF INCOME OR GOVERNMENT BENEFITS. AS TO PLAINTIFF TUYAKBAYEV, DANIYAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-11-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT PAVEL KARTSEV IS PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
PAYMENT OF FEE FOR PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF TUYAKBAYEV, DANIYAR
ORDER RE: OFF CALENDAR (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
